ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "zipcode" TEXT /* Zip code of the property */,
  "district" TEXT /* District where the property is located */,
  "sqft" INTEGER /* Square footage of the property */,
  "numbedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "numbathrooms" REAL /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "floors" INTEGER /* Number of floors in the property */,
  "view" INTEGER /* Whether the property has a view */,
  "saleprice" INTEGER /* Sale price of the property */,
  "askingprice" INTEGER /* Asking price of the property */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., single-family home, apartment, townhouse) */,
  "last_renovated" INTEGER /* Year the property was last renovated */,
  "garage" INTEGER /* Number of garage spaces */,
  "pool" INTEGER /* Whether the property has a pool */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Additional amenities */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent managing the property */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the property (e.g., available, under contract, sold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_zipcode FOREIGN KEY ("zipcode") REFERENCES zipcodes ("zipcode"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_district FOREIGN KEY ("district") REFERENCES districts ("district_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income of residents in the district */,
  "median_home_value" INTEGER /* Median home value in the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zipcodes" (
  "zipcode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zipcode */,
  "zipcode" TEXT /* Zip code */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the zipcode is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the zipcode is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zipcode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the agent */,
  "commission_rate" REAL /* Commission rate for the agent */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the agent joined the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_registered" TEXT /* Date the customer registered */,
  "last_viewed_property" TEXT /* Date the customer last viewed a property */,
  "preferred_properties" TEXT /* Preferred property types or features */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being viewed */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date of the view */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who viewed the property */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent who showed the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_views_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_views_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_views_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" INTEGER /* Price of the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who purchased the property */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent who facilitated the sale */,
  "commission_paid" INTEGER /* Amount of commission paid to the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
